records.question: Which county public safety entries have the name Abbotsford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE county_public_safety.name = 'Abbotsford'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cps.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety cps
INNER JOIN city c ON cps.County_ID = c.County_ID
WHERE cps.Name = 'Abbotsford'

records.question: Which county public safety units have the police force Central Saanich Police, serve Canóvanas where the Hispanic population is exactly 99.2 and the Asian population is at most 0.2, the White population is at most 61.2, and have no more than 21 police officers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE city.asian <= 0.2 AND city.name = 'Canóvanas' AND county_public_safety.police_force = 'Central Saanich Police' AND city.white <= 61.2 AND city.hispanic = 99.2 AND county_public_safety.police_officers <= 21
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cps.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety cps
INNER JOIN city c ON cps.County_ID = c.County_ID
WHERE cps.Police_force = 'Central Saanich Police'
AND cps.Police_officers <= 21
AND c.Asian <= 0.2
AND c.Name = 'Canóvanas'
AND c.White <= 61.2
AND c.Hispanic = 99.2

records.question: Which county public safety departments in Castlegar have at least 11 police officers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
WHERE county_public_safety.police_officers >= 11 AND county_public_safety.name = 'Castlegar'
records.pred_sql: SELECT County_ID FROM county_public_safety WHERE Police_officers >= 11 AND Name = 'Castlegar'

records.question: Which counties have a crime rate exactly 49.0, 21 police officers, at most 801 residents per officer, a case burden of at least 39, and a population of at least 16821?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
WHERE county_public_safety.crime_rate = 49.0 AND county_public_safety.police_officers = 21 AND county_public_safety.residents_per_officer <= 801 AND county_public_safety.case_burden >= 39 AND county_public_safety.population >= 16821

records.question: Which county public safety areas have a crime rate of at least 178.0 and belong to cities where the multiracial population is at most 7.9 and the Hispanic population is at least 99.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE city.multiracial <= 7.9 AND city.hispanic >= 99.2 AND county_public_safety.crime_rate >= 178.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT county_public_safety.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety
INNER JOIN city ON county_public_safety.County_ID = city.County_ID
WHERE county_public_safety.Crime_rate >= 178.0
AND city.Multiracial <= 7.9
AND city.Hispanic >= 99.2

records.question: Which counties have at least 711 residents per officer in their public safety data?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE county_public_safety.residents_per_officer >= 711

FROM county_public_safety
INNER JOIN city ON county_public_safety.County_ID = city.County_ID
